task_completion.description: Locate the article 'The Path of the Law' in the Juris-M library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The article 'The Path of the Law' is visible and selected in the central library pane of the Juris-M application.

task_completion.description: Set the journal abbreviation for 'The Path of the Law' to 'Harv. L. Rev.'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand item details pane for 'The Path of the Law', the 'Journal Abbr' field displays exactly 'Harv. L. Rev.'

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Juris-M GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Juris-M application interface being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the database.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of DB Browser for SQLite, sqlite3 terminal, or Python scripts being used to alter the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected journal abbreviations are: 'The Path of the Law' -> 'Harv. L. Rev.', 'Constitutional Fact Review' -> 'Colum. L. Rev.', and 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts' -> 'Yale L.J.'
